headline: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR): A Quality Stock With a Staggering 55.92% ROIC
summary: Quality investing focuses on companies with strong competitive advantages and high returns on capital. Pentair plc (PNR) stands out with a 55.92% ROIC, solid cash flow, and improving profitability, making it a strong candidate for long-term portfolios.
